name: happy-path-variant-a
task: Build a metrics card widget that shows key earnings data: EPS, revenue, net income, and profit margin. Each metric should show the value and a quarter-over-quarter change indicator (green for positive, red for negative).
assertions: Positive change values use var(--green) or #34d399 via CSS variable, and negative values use var(--red) or #f87171 via CSS variable
Large metric values use JetBrains Mono at approximately 20px (between 18px and 22px) as specified for metric values
The component handles empty or missing data without crashing (includes a conditional check, fallback, or empty state rendering)
The widget does not use any box-shadow properties — depth comes from surface color only
The component includes a widget-header section that renders the payload title
